$comment: scripts/IndigoPlateauLobby.asm — the reset that makes the Elite Four a GAUNTLET: coming back down wipes the Indigo Plateau event range (ResetEventRange) whenever the challenge was under way (BIT_STARTED_ELITE_4, set when LORELEI's room loads), so the four must be beaten in one run; LANCE's door also unlocks, which makes a whiteout recoverable. The lobby also clears Victory Road 1F's boulder switch on the way through.
